kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the River Ward.
The artisan in Oldwall's levy is immediately below the Weaver.
The artisan with 8 coins does not belong to the Market Ward.
The artisan with the Hammer and the artisan with the Needle are in the same guild.
Godfrey's levy is between the artisan who makes Candles and the artisan in Bridgegate.
The artisan with the Loom's levy is at least 2 coins more than Aldric.
The artisan who makes Saddles' levy is higher than both Aldric and the artisan in Bridgegate.
The artisan with the Loom has a higher levy than the Potter.
The artisan in Riverside does not belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
The artisan with the Hammer's levy is exactly 2 coins more than Aldric.
Cedric goes with either Hammer or Pottery (but not both).

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Exactly one member of the Pike Family is in the South Watershed.
The angler at Stillwater's weight is immediately below the angler who landed the Perch.
The catch with 9 lb does not belong to the East Watershed.
The angler using the Spinnerbait and the angler using the Wobbler are in the same family.
Gus' weight is between the angler fishing with Maggot and the angler at Cedarmere.
The angler using the Spoon's weight is at least 4 lb more than Cody.
The angler fishing with Shrimp's weight is higher than both Cody and the angler at Cedarmere.
The angler using the Spoon has a higher weight than the angler who landed the Crappie.
The angler at Willowmere does not belong to the Pike Family.
The angler using the Spinnerbait's weight is exactly 4 lb more than Cody.
Dale goes with either Spinnerbait or Nightcrawler (but not both).
